title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Tanishq Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Tanishq Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tanishq Global Group! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tanishq Global Group:
Tanishq Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq Global Group!
